plan.analysis: The resolver logic in package-exports.mjs is incorrectly selecting the browser export over the node export when both are present, violating the expected behavior. Additionally, the scoped vendor directory loading fails due to incorrect resolution of the module path.

contract_coverage.contract: tests/feedback.test.mjs::deployment conditions select the server plugin
contract_coverage.postcondition: The resolver should select the node export when both browser and node exports are present.
The loader should correctly resolve and load modules from scoped vendor directories.

files.description: Update the resolver to prioritize the node export over the browser export when both are present.
Fix the module resolution logic to correctly handle scoped vendor directories.

plan.notes: Ensure that the resolver logic in package-exports.mjs prioritizes the node export when both browser and node exports are present. Also, ensure that the plugin loader correctly resolves module paths for scoped vendor directories.
plan.review_skipped_reason: complete stable-contract ownership made another generative review redundant
